author: Abhishek Dalvi
name: Lottery Ticket Hypothesis with few Floats
blurb: Supermask / LTH-style run on a 16x1024 KV4 SP-1024 transformer: all matmul weights are frozen at seed-derived init and only per-element binary masks plus a tiny set of continuous scale parameters are learned; the submission artifact is just the seed + bit-packed masks + fp16 scales, reaching val_bpb 1.2917 under the 16MB artifact cap on an A100-40GB.
